1.title: Mobile App Developer
1.Description:
● Architected and shipped a production React Native mobile application for Android and iOS, used by real players, that automatically counts consecutive kicks in sipa (a traditional Filipino game) using real-time on-device inference.
● Integrated a Google image-processing model for player detection alongside a custom ONNX model built by an in-house AI developer, combining both into a single real-time on-device inference pipeline.
● Owned implementation of all detection models within the mobile app as the sole app developer, working in an AI-assisted (Cursor) coding workflow.
● Built and maintained the app's screen navigation and full mobile architecture end-to-end.

2.title: Senior Developer
2.Description:
● Developed and tested a new AI-assisted insurance platform built with Next.js, TypeScript, Express, Azure Cosmos DB, and the OpenAI SDK, using Claude Code as the primary AI-assisted development tool.
● Authored automated test coverage with Jest and Testing Library plus Playwright end-to-end tests, alongside manual testing across dev, UAT, and production environments.
● Develop and maintain a modern insurance platform on a 5-service .NET Core microservices backend paired with a React frontend, owning both frontend development and deployment.
● Provide technical governance and quality assurance by reviewing the architectural and code contributions of peer Senior Developers to ensure system reliability and maintainability.
● Manage cloud infrastructure on AWS (EC2, API Gateway, Parameter Store) with CI/CD via GitHub Actions and AWS CodePipeline/CodeCommit.

1.title: Software Engineer
1.Description:
● Engineered a secure RESTful API for background check integrations, handling sensitive data for global enterprise clients.
● Optimized a global contingent workforce system by contributing to the Vue 3 migration, resulting in a 25% increase in frontend rendering performance.
● Collaborated with cross-functional Agile teams to deliver scalable solutions across a complex Oracle and SQL Server database landscape.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Maintained and troubleshot a supply chain management system built by other engineers, diagnosing and resolving client-reported defects across front-end and back-end layers to ensure business continuity.
● Developed bug fixes and feature enhancements using HTML, CSS, JavaScript (ES6+), and C#, maintaining high code quality and system stability.
● Managed source code versioning and branching strategies using TFS, Azure DevOps, and Git.

1.title: C# .NET Developer
1.Description:
● Developed and maintained internal web applications using ASP.NET, C#, Angular, and Oracle SQL, supporting the firm's audit and advisory practice operations.
● Collaborated with senior engineers to deliver bug fixes and feature enhancements within defined sprint timelines.
● Utilized Azure DevOps for source control, branch management, code reviews, and CI/CD pipeline execution.

1.title: Application Specialist
1.Description:
● Developed and launched the 'Accounting Integrated Management System' (AIMS) end-to-end, fully digitizing the procurement lifecycle for 100+ internal users, using JavaScript, C#, and PostgreSQL.
● Reduced manual financial processing errors by 40% through automated validation logic and optimized SQL stored procedures.

0.Title: Higher Education Digital Transformation Ecosystem

Migrated the institution from manual, paper-based processes to a secure, cloud-native infrastructure on AWS with automated CI/CD pipelines.
